aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into asymmetry, embarrassment, appetite, and the material costs of intimacy. When an edge case appears, choose the version that preserves class pressure, erotic consequence, and bodily specificity rather than smoothing the scene into tasteful distance or soft-focus safety.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene naturally contains sexual awkwardness, bodily shame, class contempt, grief, or moral compromise, vague tasteful phrasing counts as a failed draft and must be rewritten toward concrete consequence.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid polished young-man aphorisms, generic immigrant gratitude, and therapist-like confessions that make him sound more fluent in himself than he is.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Concrete road detail, upholstery, weather, money counted exactly, service-work timings, and the embarrassing specifics of bodies under strain.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: More sensuous and self-accusing, with flashes of dry humor and a stronger pull toward bodily detail when guilt or desire breaches his control.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate; he swears more freely in Hungarian or while driving, but often suppresses English profanity unless he is cornered or ashamed.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Economical, deferential, and slightly overcareful English from someone used to being paid to disappear; he does not volunteer feeling unless forced.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: He gets quieter, answers with misleading adequacy, overfocuses on tasks and routes, and notices surfaces or prices instead of naming what he feels.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Short-to-medium sentences with clean grammar; when pressured he trims explanation instead of dropping function words, and his internal syntax lengthens only when memory drags him backward.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid saintly caregiver dialogue, wise-migrant monologues, and generic romantic reassurance that would flatten her standards or intelligence.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Domestic labor, food, money, childcare, body maintenance, and cutting metaphors drawn from practical life rather than literary performance.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Warmer and more patient, but never soft-focus; tenderness from her usually arrives beside logistics, appetite, or blunt truth.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate to high; profanity is casual when she is tired, and sharper when class contempt or lies are in the room.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Brisk, practical, and darkly funny; she speaks with the tempo of someone doing three things at once and refusing ornamental self-pity.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: She becomes more precise, rearranges objects, turns fear into instructions, and lets humor curdle into bluntness when she no longer has patience for softness.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Forward-driving sentences with quick pivots and occasional sharp afterthoughts; under pressure she gets even cleaner and less decorative rather than more chaotic.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid generic rich-lady iciness, villain speech about power, and flat seductress lines that ignore her intelligence and humiliation.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Cultural shorthand, donor-world manners, marital inventory, and sensory preferences that assume comfort as baseline reality.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Needier, more self-dramatizing, and intermittently brutal in her honesty; she can become girlish, cruel, or explicit without warning when she feels discarded.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Variable; she can remain polished in public, but in private she swears with sudden precision when shame punctures decorum.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Polished, educated, and socially exact, with the confidence of old money by marriage and the habit of turning charm into command.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: She performs composure until it fails, then overexplains, touches objects she can control, and uses intimacy as leverage before she admits need directly.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Longer syntactic lines than Beni or Eszter, often shaped by qualification and wit; under pressure she spills into elegant run-ons or abruptly sharp short sentences.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid barking patriarch dialogue, cartoon cruelty, and speeches that make him sound less controlled than he works to be.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Finance, scheduling, liability, family optics, and practical abstractions that turn people into manageable units.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Only slightly looser; his most personal mode is still analytic, with impatience appearing as narrowed phrasing rather than emotional overflow.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low in public, moderate in private; he treats profanity as a tool of emphasis rather than baseline speech.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Measured, managerial, and impeccably polite in a way that signals hierarchy more effectively than raised volume would.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: He repeats numbers, asks for sequence and timing, lowers his voice, and uses politeness to increase pressure instead of relieve it.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Balanced clauses, exact nouns, and minimal filler; under pressure he grows terser and more administratively formal rather than louder.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid generic precocious-teen banter, social-media filler, and speeches that sound like adult commentary wearing a younger mouth.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: School-age urban detail, family hypocrisy, image-conscious social language, and unexpected practical observations picked up from staff and drivers.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: More wounded and more direct, though still allergic to sentimentality; when she trusts someone she becomes sharply observant rather than gushy.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate; she swears more with staff or when cornered than when performing daughterhood in front of donors.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Watchful, dry, and guardedly insolent; she has learned to speak around adult vanity with precise understatements.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: She gets still, picks at fabric or polish, narrows to concrete facts, and uses wit either as shield or weapon depending on who is listening.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Lean sentences, quick turns, and pointed questions; under pressure she can go flat and monosyllabic or suddenly cutting.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid mentor clichés, saintly wisdom, and generic male-bonding banter that makes him a device instead of a life in motion.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Road knowledge, depot rhythms, family references, and ordinary London phrasing that carries class without self-consciousness.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Practical and kind without ceremony; his care arrives through instructions, favors, and one or two hard truths rather than speeches.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate to high; profanity is easy in work talk but rarely used to posture.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Loose, capable, and lightly teasing; he speaks like a working man who has no interest in romanticizing the job.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: He checks mirrors, asks practical questions, uses humor only once before dropping it, and moves into action before discussing emotion.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Conversationally fluid with quick jokes and sudden compression when it matters; under pressure he becomes short, directive, and exact.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid stock hard-man threats, generic drunken abuse, and sudden eloquence that would ignore his exhaustion and class register.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Rent, shifts, bad tools, bodily fatigue, and family obligation stripped of romance.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: More wounded than he wants anyone to know; affection leaks through complaint, not through direct tenderness.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: High; swearing is habitual, though the exact shape depends on whether he is mocking, angry, or defeated.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Blunt, tired, and impatient, with the rough joking edge of someone whose day starts too early and ends with numbers still not adding up.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: He counts bills, gets meaner by inches rather than explosions, and redirects fear into irritation about chores, noise, or cost.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Short bursts, practical complaints, and elliptical humor that stays grammatical; under stress he repeats himself and circles money or sleep.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid femme-fatale shorthand, tragic-muse vagueness, and generic older-woman seduction lines that erase her local specificity and maternal life.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Provincial Hungarian domesticity crossed with secretive erotic energy, maternal detail, and the language of wanting more life than her town allows.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Restless, hungry, and more reckless than romantic once the affair is underway; intimacy brings candor and manipulation in the same breath.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Variable; she can stay teasingly decorous or turn suddenly coarse when anger or panic strips away flirtation.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Warm, flirtatious, and slightly overdressed for ordinary spaces; she knows how to sound casual while inviting risk.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: She laughs at the wrong moment, overpromises, touches first, and talks faster when she feels the affair slipping beyond her control.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Smooth spoken lines with persuasive detail; under pressure her syntax loosens, speeds up, and becomes more contradictory rather than less articulate.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid bohemian caricature, seductive-artist cliches, and speeches that overstate his importance beyond the scenes he occupies.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Studio process, art-world shorthand, aesthetic contempt, and emotional language deployed mainly to defend his own freedom.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: More petulant and self-protective than his public persona suggests; intimacy makes him sharper, not deeper.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate; he swears with bored precision when cornered or interrupted.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Cultured, thin-skinned, and performatively casual in the way successful artists can be when they assume service people will absorb the room's discomfort.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: He tidies objects while pretending not to care, intellectualizes conflict, and grows more cutting when he senses emotional demand.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Loose, educated speech with parenthetical swerves and quick dismissals; under pressure he gets short, ironic, and ungenerous.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm in spoken English here; uncontracted forms should appear mainly for precision, social performance, or emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary chapter feel through scene count, dialogue density, movement versus waiting, and whether the turn comes from confrontation, discovery, aftermath, preparation, or unwanted intrusion. A nocturnal chauffeur chapter should not be followed by another chapter with the same pulse and architecture; counter hard chapters with domestic or reflective ones that still advance consequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: Plainspoken but exact, materially grounded, and alert to social register; imagery should emerge from labor, appetite, weather, and bodily memory rather than from decorative abstraction.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person anchored to Beni, with memory pressure and sensory bleed but no roaming omniscience.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate compressed, road-tight paragraphs with slower observational passages that let smell, touch, and silence accumulate; keep sentence music controlled rather than showy.
